unit.note: shared/tests full suite: 3030 passed, 23 skipped (pre-existing skip set), 1 PRE-EXISTING env-local failure (test_architecture_md_reflects_arch_impact — flags gitignored main-tree decision-drops of two OTHER in-flight iterates, event-self-id + canon-exempt-agent-doc-caches; reproduced identically on the clean main tree, absent in CI checkouts). e2e.note: Real-subprocess CLI tests (test_triage_cli_json.py) incl. the two new legacy-console-encoding regressions (PYTHONIOENCODING=cp1252 forces the crash deterministically on every platform).

test_completeness.enumeration_basis: Behaviors changed by _ensure_utf8_stdout in triage_cli.py (root-cause fix for the cp1252 UnicodeEncodeError found by the webui pending-delivery-badge boundary probe).

behaviors.behavior: list --json emits UTF-8 bytes under a legacy console codepage (machine contract)
human list renders non-ASCII titles instead of crashing
streams without reconfigure() are tolerated (guarded getattr)
behaviors.evidence: in-process invocations in test_triage_cli.py (14/14, pytest-captured stdout) stay green

behaviors.behavior: pre-existing list/--json semantics unchanged (union, pendingDelivery, open-filter)
